result.stdout:
Usage: Evolve.Tool [options] <Command> <Database>

Arguments:
  Command                          migrate | erase | repair | info | validate
                                   Allowed values are: migrate, erase, repair,
                                   info, validate.
  Database                         postgresql | sqlite | sqlserver | mysql |
                                   mariadb | cassandra | cockroachdb
                                   Allowed values are: postgresql, sqlite,
                                   sqlserver, mysql, mariadb, cassandra,
                                   cockroachdb.

Options:
  -c|--connection-string           The connection string to the target database
                                   engine. Must have the necessary privileges to
                                   execute ddl.
  -l|--location                    Paths to scan recursively for migration
                                   scripts. Default: Sql_Scripts
  -s|--schema                      A list of schemas managed by Evolve. If
                                   empty, the default schema for the datasource
                                   connection is used.
  --metadata-table-schema          The schema in which the metadata table
                                   is/should be. If empty, it is the first
                                   schema defined or the one of the datasource
                                   connection.
  --metadata-table                 The name of the metadata table. Default:
                                   changelog
  -p|--placeholder                 Placeholders are strings to replace in
                                   migration scripts. Format for commandline is
                                   "key:value".
  --placeholder-prefix             The prefix of the placeholders. Default: ${
  --placeholder-suffix             The suffix of the placeholders. Default: }
  --target-version                 Target version to reach. If empty it evolves
                                   all the way up.
  --start-version                  Version used as starting point for already
                                   existing databases. Default: 0
  --scripts-prefix                 Migration scripts file names prefix. Default:
                                   V
  --repeatable-scripts-prefix      Repeatable migration scripts file names
                                   prefix. Default: R
  --scripts-suffix                 Migration scripts files extension. Default:
                                   .sql
  --scripts-separator              Migration scripts file names separator.
                                   Default: __
  --encoding                       The encoding of migration scripts. Default:
                                   UTF-8
  --command-timeout                The wait time in seconds before terminating
                                   the attempt to execute a migration and
                                   generating an error. Default: 30
  --ambient-tx-timeout             The wait time in seconds before terminating
                                   the attempt to execute a migration and
                                   generating an error in the ambient
                                   transaction. Default: 60
  --out-of-order                   Allows migration scripts to be run “out of
                                   order”. Default: false
  --erase-disabled                 When set, ensures that Evolve will never
                                   erase schemas. Highly recommended in
                                   production. Default: false
  --erase-on-validation-error      When set, Evolve will erase the database
                                   schemas and will re-execute migration scripts
                                   from scratch if validation phase fails.
                                   Intended to be used in development only.
                                   Default: fasle
  --enable-cluster-mode            By default, Evolve will use a session level
                                   lock to coordinate the migration on multiple
                                   nodes. Default: true
  -a|--embedded-resource-assembly  When set, Evolve will scan the given list of
                                   assembly to load embedded migration scripts.
  -f|--embedded-resource-filter    When set, exclude embedded migration scripts
                                   that do not start with one of these filters.
  --retry-repeatable               When set, execute repeatedly all repeatable
                                   migrations for as long as the number of
                                   errors decreases, so that you can name them
                                   more easily. Default: false
  --transaction-mode               Scope of the Evolve transaction. Default:
                                   CommitEach
                                   Allowed values are: CommitEach, CommitAll,
                                   RollbackAll.
  --skip-next-migrations           When set, mark all subsequent migrations as
                                   applied. Default: false
  --keyspace                       A list of keyspaces managed by Evolve
                                   (Cassandra only).
  --metadata-table-keyspace        The keyspace in which the metadata table
                                   is/should be (Cassandra only).
  --sql-server-access-token        An Azure-issued access token to be used when
                                   connecting to SQL Server.
  -?|-h|--help                     Show help information.
